name: Yacktman, Ellyn

Stephen Yacktman is CIO/Partner of Austin-based Yacktman Asset Management. Her own occupation is homemaker; economic identity is the family's finance/asset-management fortune.

name: Michelsen, Matthew
resolved_employer: Tech entrepreneur/investor running family office Gothams LLC (fka GothamAlpha); founder of The Backplane, Dash Radio, Algomus. Also a major Texas state government contractor.
evidence: Serial tech entrepreneur/investor who moved from California to the Lakeway/Lake Travis area (78734, matches donor) in 2020, owns an Italian-villa mansion overlooking Lake Travis. His firm Gothams LLC received ~$563M in Texas contracts (Curative COVID testing ~$400M; a $43M Operation Lone Star migrant-detention facility). A big GOP donor (Abbott $150k, Hegar $50k, DeSantis $25k) who also gave $25k to Democratic Travis County Judge Andy Brown - exactly matching this donor record.

affiliations.org: Gothams LLC (Operation Lone Star migrant-detention contractor)
affiliations.role: Founder/owner; company holds Texas border-security detention and COVID-testing contracts

name: Lorenz, Perry Howard

evidence: Longtime Austin developer active since 1977, pioneer of downtown and East Austin mid/high-rise residential; developed 1000+ condo units. 78702 East Austin address matches his development turf. Occupation 'Real Estate / self' in record corroborates.

name: Dobson, Lynne
resolved_employer: Whataburger heiress and board member (daughter of founder Harmon Dobson); co-founder of the Tejemos Foundation and former photojournalist. Full-time philanthropist.
evidence: Lynne Dobson is one of three children of Whataburger founder Harmon Dobson and sits on the Whataburger board (family net worth ~$2.6B). A former Austin American-Statesman photojournalist, she now runs the Tejemos Foundation with husband Greg Wooldridge, funding progressive/health-equity, civil-rights, reproductive-health, parks and public-media causes (e.g., $1.5M to KUT). West Lake Hills 78746 address and record 'business owner philanthropist' match.
